bugs.summary: The patch makes missing optional workflow roots fatal.
bugs.impact: listWorkflows/resolveWorkflowRef can fail in normal installations where a project, package, or home workflow directory does not exist.
acceptableFixes: Continue returning [] for ENOENT in optional workflow roots.
Add a workflow registry test with absent optional roots.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: This only fails when optional roots such as ~/.pi/agent/workflows are absent.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
